title: Aurora 9-inch Bonnie Honey Teddy Bear, Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Teddy Bear Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Bonnie Bear is a gorgeous super soft Teddy Bear with a cuddly body
Children will love this soft and huggable Teddy Bear
description: Bonnie Teddy Bear is a beautiful, traditional looking plush honey brown bear. Bonnie has a gorgeous super soft cuddy body with a stunning smile which makes you want to share lots of hugs. Bonnie makes the perfect gift for anyone who loves teddy bears and plush soft toys. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
